name: Mend (WhiteSource) SCA API
what_it_does: Software Composition Analysis (SCA) and application security platform with REST API — scanning open-source dependencies for vulnerabilities, license compliance, and supply chain risks across 200+ programming languages, with SBOM generation and developer workflow integration.
use_cases: Scanning project dependencies for CVEs and license issues via CI/CD API integration
Generating SBOM (Software Bill of Materials) for compliance and procurement
Querying vulnerability inventory across all repositories for risk reporting
Automating PR blocking based on policy violations via API-driven checks
Exporting license compliance data for legal review via reporting API
not_for: SAST (static analysis of custom code) — use Semgrep or CodeQL for that
Runtime security monitoring (use Falco or Sysdig)
Pure secret scanning (use GitGuardian or Gitleaks)
best_when: An enterprise DevSecOps team needs comprehensive open-source vulnerability and license management with CI/CD integration, SBOM generation, and policy enforcement at scale.
avoid_when: You primarily write custom code (not open-source dependent), need SAST for proprietary code, or are a small team where Snyk's developer-friendly UX is better suited.

auth.notes: User key and org token for API authentication. JWT-based tokens for API calls. Organization and product hierarchy affects scoping. API key scoped to organization. Service accounts for CI/CD automation. Token-based auth for REST API endpoints.

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise pricing; contact sales for quotes
pricing.notes: Enterprise-only pricing. Israeli company (Tel Aviv). Formerly WhiteSource, rebranded to Mend.io. Backed by multiple VCs. Strong enterprise adoption — Fortune 500 customers. SBOM generation key differentiator. Mend Renovate (formerly Renovate Bot) included. Integration with GitHub, GitLab, Azure DevOps, Jenkins.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for projects, products, organizations, vulnerabilities, licenses, and SBOM. API key + org token auth. Webhook for scan completion and policy violations. Complex org/product/project hierarchy — must understand structure before API calls. SDKs for Java, Python, JS.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Scan initiation creates new scan jobs — not idempotent. Vulnerability and license reads idempotent. Policy rule management idempotent by ID. SBOM generation creates new artifacts.
known_agent_gotchas: Three-level hierarchy (organization → product → project) must be navigated for all API calls
User key AND organization token both required for authentication
Scan results may take minutes — async polling required after scan initiation
WhiteSource → Mend rebranding means older documentation references WhiteSource APIs

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and ISO27001 certified. GDPR compliant. Israeli security company — strong security culture. US and EU data residency. Organization-scoped tokens. Service accounts for CI/CD. Source code and dependency data requires careful data governance.
